title: the trials
description: a mod that makes the world of MC more challenging and more fun by adding more things to the player.
body:
this mod adds new bosses from L_Ends and mowzie's mobs, with other things like quests from villager quests and new villager systems.
It also add currency and other goodies to help manage a economy with friends whilst keeping it simple.
you may also notice that this modpack adds create and its industry of items galore.
this modpack also brings quality of life mods like Corpses, enchant dsc, clumps and ways to quick chop and mine.
this modpack may also add things like origins and origins++ for more freedom.
